posts.author: anupam.kr
posts.text: Q4 Result is pretty bad. The topline is good(745.61) but bottom line is wiped-out( 6.00 ). Due to this EPS also down very much and has cascading effect on PE as well. Good news is gear order book got some traction. Some more quantity can be added and it can be increase if they are able to recoup the profit. Disclaimer: Already Invested. Period Total Gear MHE YoY Chg (Total) Q3 FY26 End (31-Dec-2025) 1,372 811 561 +24% Q4 FY26 End (31-Mar-2026) 1,292 894 398 +36%
